heroSubtitle: Shrink your PDF files by up to 90% without losing quality. Upload up to 10 files at once — fast, secure, and completely free.

featuresTitle: Why Our PDF Compressor Works Better
featuresSubtitle: No bloated software, no subscriptions. Just upload your PDF and get a smaller file in seconds.
feature1Desc: We intelligently optimize embedded images — the biggest culprits in large PDFs — without making them look worse.
feature2Desc: Choose extreme compression for the smallest file, or balanced mode to keep a great-looking result. Your call.
feature3Desc: Files are encrypted in transit and automatically deleted from our servers within one hour. We never store your documents.
stepsSubtitle: The fastest way to shrink a PDF file.
step1Desc: Select up to 10 PDF files at once. Each can be up to 100MB. Drag and drop or click to browse.
step2Desc: Choose Maximum Quality, Balanced, or Extreme Compression. Balanced is the sweet spot for most people.
step3Desc: Compression takes just a few seconds. Download your optimized PDF files straight away.
faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about compressing PDF files.
faq1Question: How much can I reduce my PDF file size?
faq1Answer: It depends on what's in the PDF. Files heavy with images can shrink by up to 90%. Text-only documents typically see 20–40% reduction. The Extreme mode gives the smallest file; Balanced keeps quality high.
faq2Question: Will the compressed PDF look different?
faq2Answer: In Balanced mode, the difference is barely noticeable — text stays crisp and images look clean. Extreme mode does reduce image quality slightly, but it's a big size win if that's what you need.
faq3Question: Can I compress more than one PDF at a time?
faq3Answer: Yes — upload up to 10 PDFs at once. We process them all together and give you a zip file to download when there's more than one.
faq4Question: Is there a file size limit?
faq4Answer: Each file can be up to 100MB. If yours is bigger, try splitting it first with our PDF splitter tool, then compress the parts.
faq5Question: What happens to my files after compression?
faq5Answer: Everything is deleted within one hour of processing. Your files are encrypted during the upload and transfer. We don't read them, keep them, or share them.
seoTitle: When You Need to Shrink a PDF
seoP1: Large PDFs are a pain to email, slow to upload, and eat up storage. Whether it's a scanned document, a presentation packed with images, or a form that's ballooned in size — our compressor handles it without you needing to install anything.
seoP2: You choose how aggressive the compression is. Maximum Quality mode (20–40% reduction) keeps everything looking sharp. Balanced (40–70%) is the go-to for most files. Extreme (70–90%) gives you the smallest possible file when size matters more than perfect image quality.
seoP3: Scanned documents, forms, presentations, ebooks, contracts — if it's a PDF, we can compress it. Our tool works across all devices: desktop, tablet, and phone. No app download, no account needed.
ctaSubtitle: Free, fast, and private. Drop your files and get smaller PDFs in seconds.

maximum.name: Maximum Quality
maximum.hint: Best for documents where readability is critical — reports, legal files, or anything that needs to stay sharp.

balanced.hint: The sweet spot for most PDFs. Good-looking result with a meaningfully smaller file size.

extreme.name: Extreme
extreme.hint: Use this when file size matters most — email attachments, mobile viewing, or storage-constrained situations.
